description_long: This is a rustic wooden stool constructed from rough-hewn timber, featuring a thick, rectangular seat with visible grain, knots, and natural imperfections. The stool stands on four sturdy, uneven legs that are slightly angled outward, giving it a hand-crafted, weathered appearance. The legs are joined by a single horizontal support bar, adding stability and reinforcing the structure. The wood surface is unpolished, with a matte, coarse finish and some visible cracks and chips, suggesting age and frequent use. There are no decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The stool's overall form and material suggest it is suitable for outdoor or urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public gathering spaces.
description: A rustic, hand-crafted wooden stool with a thick, weathered seat and four sturdy, uneven legs. The surface is rough and unpolished, highlighting its utilitarian and aged character.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the thick wooden seat and two of the angled legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the seat, all four legs, and the central support bar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the rough edge and leg alignment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back edges of the seat and the uneven, outward-angled legs.
